title: Make repository frontier the primary work view
goal: Present the active or safely claimable ball per repository by combining tasks, queue weight, claims, leases, runs, PRs and blockers.

acceptance.assertion: At most one active claimed write ball is shown per repository.
Conflict-free balls in different repositories are visible concurrently without a global one-ball bottleneck.
Each unavailable ball explains the concrete claim, lease, PR, dependency or approval blocker.
Live Register may annotate the frontier but cannot select, claim or dispatch a task.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
